'''Drog II''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]]-inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector's]] [[Drog system/Legends|Drog system]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''
